description: Float truncation fix, false positive removal, precision measurement, unified manifest
changes_from_v436: _ci_key: int(x*10000) -> int(round(x*10000)), fixes 5% of float values (JUPITER, CheckMate 067 affected)
Value-only patterns: added \b(?!\s*%) guard to prevent 'aOR 95% CI' -> OR=95 false positive
OR=95 false positive eliminated from PMC12680170 (was misparse of 'aOR 95% CI')
Curated corpus: 196->183 extractions (13 false positives removed by % guard)
25 regression tests (2 new truncation tests), all passing
Precision measured: 98.5% on curated corpus (3/196 false positives pre-fix)

curated_corpus.note: 13 fewer extractions than v4.3.6 due to % guard removing false positives

bugs_fixed._ci_key_truncation: int(0.69*10000)=6899, now int(round(0.69*10000))=6900. Affected JUPITER and CheckMate 067 CIs.
bugs_fixed.or_95_false_positive: Pattern 'aOR 95% CI' was parsed as OR=95.0. Fixed with \b(?!\s*%) negative lookahead.
bugs_fixed.percent_guard: All HR/OR/RR value-only patterns now reject values followed by % (e.g., 'HR 95%' no longer extracted as HR=95)

known_remaining_issues.table_cis: 18/22 missing CIs in curated corpus are in tables (text extraction ceiling)
known_remaining_issues.declare_timi: HR=0.83 from DECLARE-TIMI 58 still not extracted from snippet
known_remaining_issues.oa_non_rcts: 21/61 OA corpus v2 papers have 0 extractions (many are not RCTs)
known_remaining_issues.no_primary_outcome_ranking: Extractor returns all effects, no way to identify primary outcome
